summary_ja: 2026-06-06 raw backlog batch (5 articles). 全記事が過去のパイプライン実行またはトリアージ済み。MAI-Thinking-1レポートはconcepts/mai-thinking-1-tech-report.mdで完全にキャプ済み。Dwarkesh AGI Economicsインタビューはentities/dwarkesh-patel.md更新済み。Ed Zitron ROI記事はentities/ed-zitron.mdに専用セクションあり。Paul Graham（2001年プログラミング言語論）とDan Luu（Twitterキャッシュインシデント）はAI/LLMスコープ外。全件skip、アクションなし。

decisions.reason: Already captured in concepts/mai-thinking-1-tech-report.md and concepts/microsoft-mai-models.md. 372KB tech report fully ingested 2026-06-03.

decisions.reason: Out of scope. 2001 essay about programming language popularity factors (merits vs external forces, hacker preferences), not AI/LLM-specific.
decisions.body_excerpt: Paul Graham essay on why programming languages become popular. 'Programming languages are tools, designed for people.' Analysis of hacker preferences vs language designer priorities.
